commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a generic channel-message `send.poll` sender, bridges outbound `sendPoll` handlers into poll receipts, declares Discord poll delivery through that adapter, and updates focused contract tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR, not a bug report. Source review confirms current main lacks `send.poll`, and the PR diff supplies mocked adapter coverage for the new path.
commands.review_followup: No narrow automated repair remains; the blocker is maintainer acceptance of the public SDK shape and normal merge validation.

target.title: feat(plugin-sdk): add generic channel poll sender
target.body:
## Summary
- add a generic `send.poll` channel-message sender and `ChannelMessageSendPollContext`
- let outbound-derived message adapters bridge existing `ChannelOutboundAdapter.sendPoll` implementations into message receipts
- declare Discord poll delivery through the generic channel-message adapter instead of expanding the deprecated Discord SDK facade
- add bridge and Discord adapter proofs for poll receipts and poll dispatch

Refs #85123.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/message/outbound-bridge.test.ts extensions/discord/src/channel.message-adapter.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-message.test.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: channel plugins can expose poll sends through the generic `openclaw/plugin-sdk/channel-message` adapter contract instead of requiring new channel-specific SDK exports.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout with the existing Discord channel outbound adapter mocked through its channel-message adapter contract.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/message/outbound-bridge.test.ts extensions/discord/src/channel.message-adapter.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-message.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: the outbound bridge test proves `send.poll` wraps an outbound poll send into a `poll` receipt, and the Discord channel-message adapter proof verifies `send.poll` calls the existing Discord `sendPollDiscord` path with target/account/silent options.
Observed result after fix: 3 test files passed, 12 tests passed.
What was not tested: live Discord API poll creation; the existing Discord API send path is exercised through mocked outbound adapter proofs only.
target.author: steipete
